title: Mob Vision
description: Mob Vision shows mob attack and view ranges. Press O to customize. Supports Creepers, Zombies, and Spiders.
body:
IF YOU WANT ME TO UPDATE THIS MOD JOIN THE DISCORD SERVER
# 🦠 Mob Vision  

**Mob Vision** is a simple yet powerful mod that allows you to visualize the **attack range** and **view range** of specific hostile mobs in Minecraft. This can help you understand how mobs detect and engage with players, making it a great tool for both survival and technical players.  

## 🌟 Features  
- ✅ **Visualize Mob Ranges** – See the exact **attack range** and **view range** of supported mobs.  
- ✅ **Customizable Display** – Adjust **render distance** and **thickness** for better visibility.  
- ✅ **GUI Control** – Press `O` to open the settings GUI and toggle individual mobs or range types.  
- ✅ **Optimized & Lightweight** – Designed for minimal performance impact.  

## 🔧 Supported Mobs (currently)  
-  **Creeper** – Displays its **detection range** and **explosion trigger range**.  
-  **Zombie** – Shows how far it can see and chase the player.  
-  **Spider** – Visualizes its **jump attack** and **chase range**.  

## 🎮 How to Use  
1. Press `O` to open the **Mob Vision GUI**.  
2. Toggle individual mobs **on/off**.  
3. Enable or disable **attack range** and **view range** separately.  
4. Adjust **render distance** and **line thickness** for better visibility.  

## 🛠 Compatibility  
- 💻 Works in **singleplayer** and **multiplayer (client-side only)**.  
- 🔧 No dependencies required!  

🔹 **Future updates will add support for more mobs and improved customization!**  

## 🎩 Support on Discord
